creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have the same patch, but was waiting for some issues with pecl-xdiff
(calling out
That there's an error in libxdiff, even with this).

Approved, since the pecl-xdiff version was updated.  I'm not sure
That the combination will work yet.  I was waiting for the 
Pecl-xdiff author to get back to me.


-- 
Larry Rosenman                     http://www.lerctr.org/~ler
Phone: +1 512-248-2683                 E-Mail: ler@lerctr.org
US Mail: 430 Valona Loop, Round Rock, TX 78681-3893

From: Edwin Groothuis [mailto:edwin@FreeBSD.org] 
Sent: Tuesday, April 13, 2010 8:30 AM
To: ler@lerctr.org
Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/145671: [PATCH] textproc/libxdiff: update to 0.23

Maintainer of textproc/libxdiff,

Please note that PR ports/145671 has just been submitted.

If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
and a committer will take care of it.

The full text of the PR can be found at:
    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/145671

Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
